title: *NEW* Kitchen Gun Mod!
description: Say goodbye to germs (and mobs) with new kitchen gun & toilet grenade!
body:
Say goodbye to germs (and mobs) with new kitchen gun & toilet grenade! Place down a crafting table to turn a villager into the Derek Baum villager. They will sell you gunpowder and cleaning bullets, but once you level them up you can buy a Kitchen Gun or some Toilet Grenades. craft a music disc with songs from Derek's personal collection. 

In case you didn't already understand the refernce, here it is:
